hero.title: Frontend Developer
hero.tagline: I turn complex problems into clean, fast interfaces.

about.label: About Me
about.title: My Professional Story
about.description: Building scalable React applications with a focus on performance and clean code.
about.summary: 4+ years building production-grade React applications — from large-scale LMS platforms to real-time enterprise tools. I specialize in turning Figma designs into fast, scalable interfaces that don't just look good, they perform.
about.expertiseDetails: Specialized in React.js ecosystems, responsive UI systems, global state management, and lightweight server integrations.
about.careerStanceDetails: Committed to clean code architectures, remote development standards, and expanding expertise into Full-Stack workflows.

educationList.description: Acquired analytical problem-solving and rigorous engineering methods.
Developed interest in programming; self-taught web development; built the school website as a graduation project.

tech.label: Tech Stack
tech.title: Technologies Showcase
tech.description: A continuous showcase of the modern toolkits, frameworks, and developer workflows I master.

journey.label: Career Journey
journey.title: The Path So Far
journey.description: Every role shaped my approach to building products that matter.

journeyList.description: Engineered high-engagement web experiences and collaborated with backend teams.
highlights: Built Warehouse Management System (WMS) from scratch — React, Redux Toolkit: visual mapping & scanner integration.
Implemented visual storage layouts and offline stock count transactions to prevent data drops.
Integrated barcode scanner inputs; connected to Laravel backend APIs via AJAX queries.

journeyList.description: Led the visual redesign and development of multiple digital classrooms and LMS web applications.
highlights: Built Ertiqaa Academy's full student portal with React, Redux, Firebase, MUI & Framer Motion.
Developed 6+ interactive exam formats (MCQ, matching, ordering) with strict state validation.
Sole developer for HAYA Academy — complete classroom frontend with jQuery & Laravel.

journeyList.description: Refactored and modernized a legacy frontend codebase, improving performance and visual consistency.
highlights: Refactored legacy UI components to modern CSS tokens and design standards.
Resolved critical display issues and improved rendering speeds of legacy codebases.
Improved responsive layouts across landing pages and admin dashboards.

journeyList.description: Built and sold a Restaurant ERP system deployed across 4+ active businesses.
highlights: Built a drag-and-drop table layout builder with real-time order queue binding.
Designed the full admin dashboard: menu controls, order streams & floor plan management.
Engineered lightweight customer interfaces for digital menu browsing and checkout.

projects.label: Projects
projects.title: Featured Work
projects.description: Selected applications built for enterprise, education, and user engagement.

projectsList.tagline: Entertainment and offers platform built from scratch
projectsList.description: A comprehensive entertainment and offers system built from the ground up, featuring interactive marathons, chat streams, and geo-located discovery maps.
projectsList.problem: The client required a scalable, high-engagement entertainment and offers platform that supports real-time communication, active user challenges, and location-based discovery.
challenges: Integrating Google Maps API with high performance.
Designing real-time chat and story updates.
Managing complex user engagement states (countdown timers, leaderboards) client-side.
projectsList.solution: Engineered the frontend using React and Redux Toolkit for clean state separation, Firebase for real-time chat/presence, and custom countdown hooks for synchronized challenges.
results: Smooth geo-located offers search without UI lagging

projectsList.description: A premium educational platform featuring multimedia classrooms, timed evaluations, progress reports, and 6+ interactive question styles.
projectsList.problem: The academy required an advanced student portal capable of rendering multiple distinct interactive exam types and video/audio lessons while ensuring progress metrics are tracked in real time.
challenges: Developing robust and reusable renderers for 6+ question types.
Handling quiz state preservation during network interruptions.
Supporting multi-language localization seamlessly across student assets.
projectsList.solution: Created a modular question parser with strict TypeScript validation, Radix UI and Tailwind CSS for accessible inputs, and state management using Redux Toolkit and Firebase.
results: Full responsiveness for all student devices

projectsList.tagline: Custom ERP with drag-and-drop table management
projectsList.description: An administrative and consumer restaurant suite that handles digital menu ordering, payment gateways, and visual floor plans.
projectsList.problem: Local dining establishments lacked an unified dashboard to manage orders, modify table arrangements dynamically, and present a seamless customer checkout flow.
challenges: Designing an interactive drag-and-drop table manager.
Maintaining synchronized state between the kitchen and administrative views.
projectsList.solution: Developed a custom drag-and-drop grid canvas using HTML5 Drag and Drop APIs, combined with a highly optimized order tracking queue that manages statuses in real-time.
results: Deployed and sold to 4+ dining businesses
Zero order dropping in peak operational hours

projectsList.tagline: Custom student platform with jQuery and Laravel
projectsList.description: A traditional server-rendered educational platform with media-rich lesson plans, quizzes, and automated evaluations.
projectsList.problem: The school needed an affordable, fast e-learning system with media support and automated grading features without the complexity of a heavy single-page application framework.
challenges: Structuring clean, modular frontend logic in jQuery without component encapsulation.
Integrating Laravel APIs seamlessly with dynamic AJAX requests.
projectsList.solution: Implemented a structured MVC layout on the Laravel backend, writing modular jQuery scripts with custom namespaces to handle quiz scoring, media playbacks, and timed actions.
results: Developed successfully as sole frontend coder

projectsList.tagline: Redesigned and optimized educational web app
projectsList.description: A detailed redesign and code modernization phase for an active online portal, improving overall user experience and page speed scores.
projectsList.problem: The existing platform suffered from outdated UI design, poor mobile responsiveness, and high load times that negatively impacted student engagement.
challenges: Refactoring and optimizing legacy Laravel/jQuery integrations without breaking existing user data.
Upgrading UI elements to modern standards while retaining core logic.
projectsList.solution: Conducted a complete UI/UX audit, refactored redundant CSS/JS scripts, optimized images, and modernized the layout to align with responsive design rules.
results: Rebuilt key portals for enhanced visual clarity
100% responsiveness on mobile tablets and phones

challenges.label: Challenges
challenges.title: Engineering Challenges
challenges.description: Deep dive into complex problems I solved and their architectural outcomes.

challengesList.title: Real-Time Leaderboard & Chat Sync
challengesList.summary: Built real-time features with Firebase and custom timer hooks. Synced live leaderboards and chat across multiple users with zero-latency updates.
challengesList.challenge: Syncing countdown timers for active marathon challenges and event chat rooms across concurrent users without lagging the main browser thread.
challengesList.solution: Implemented a unified React Context with requestAnimationFrame loop for counting, and paired it with Firebase Realtime Database observers.
challengesList.outcome: Maintained perfectly synced timers (<10ms offset) and messaging streams across users, preserving smooth 60fps rendering.

challengesList.title: Polymorphic Assessment Engine
challengesList.summary: Created a flexible question renderer supporting 6+ exam formats including MCQ, ordering, and matching. Built with a single unified component architecture.
challengesList.challenge: Designing a robust client-side quiz parser that handles MCQ, matching, ordering, fill-in-the-blank, essay questions with state preservation and timer hooks.
challengesList.solution: Developed a polymorphic React component set typed strictly in TypeScript, managing a central reducer for question transitions and client state.
challengesList.outcome: Deployed to thousands of students, enabling seamless timed exams with automatic progress saving during network drops.

challengesList.title: Interactive Drag & Drop Table Grid
challengesList.summary: Built custom drag-and-drop table layouts for administrative dashboards without third-party libraries. Supports dynamic row/column reordering in real time.
challengesList.challenge: Enabling restaurant administrators to visually place, resize, and connect dining tables inside a grid layout that instantly binds to order queues.
challengesList.solution: Built an interactive canvas using HTML5 Drag and Drop APIs combined with responsive coordinate calculations and client-side bounding checks.
challengesList.outcome: Successfully rolled out to 4+ active businesses, reducing layout modification time from hours to minutes.

challengesList.title: Legacy Integration Modernization
challengesList.summary: Refactored jQuery/Laravel apps to meet modern frontend standards. Achieved significant improvements in responsiveness, rendering speed, and code maintainability.
challengesList.challenge: Inheriting outdated web apps with bloated stylesheets, unorganized script sheets, and slow page-load speeds.
challengesList.solution: Performed a complete audit, eliminated redundant styling classes, modularized scripts, and optimized media delivery systems.
challengesList.outcome: Reduced load times significantly and delivered clean visual responsiveness across mobile screens.

challengesList.title: Geo-Located Offers Discovery
challengesList.summary: Integrated Google Maps API for location-based offers search and discovery. Implemented dynamic map markers with real-time filtering by category and distance.
challengesList.challenge: Dynamically fetching and clustering local offers on a map layout as the user pans or zooms, preventing screen stuttering or slow queries.
challengesList.solution: Implemented debounced map boundary updates, marker clustering, and custom location hooks to query offers efficiently via AJAX.
challengesList.outcome: Created an immersive, stutter-free map experience allowing students and users to find offers in real-time.
